metadata.description: mage — a portable, self-maintaining knowledge base for software systems, with skills for durable note capture and spec-driven development.

plugins.name: mage
plugins.description: mage skills: mage:learn (capture durable notes) + the mage:specify / mage:clarify / mage:plan / mage:tasks / mage:implement / mage:analyze / mage:constitution spec-driven workflow + mage:guide (how to use the knowledge base).
